name: Copilot Spend
description: GitHub Copilot premium-request spend by model, user and team over a date range.

datasets.title: Premium-request spend by user, model and month
datasets.description: Derived from premium-requests — sync that dataset first.
datasets.sql: SELECT substr(f.day, 1, 7) AS month, u.login AS user, f.model AS model, SUM(f.quantity) AS requests, SUM(COALESCE(f.gross_amount_usd, 0)) AS gross_usd, SUM(COALESCE(f.net_amount_usd, 0)) AS net_usd FROM usage_facts f JOIN orgs o ON o.id = f.org_id AND o.login = :org JOIN skus s ON s.id = f.sku_id AND s.name = 'copilot_premium_request' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = f.user_id WHERE f.metric LIKE 'premium_requests%' AND f.day BETWEEN :from AND :to GROUP BY month, user, model ORDER BY month, user, model

datasets.title: Premium-request spend by team, model and month
datasets.description: A user in two teams counts in both team rollups (by design).
datasets.sql: SELECT substr(f.day, 1, 7) AS month, t.slug AS team, f.model AS model, SUM(f.quantity) AS requests, SUM(COALESCE(f.net_amount_usd, 0)) AS net_usd FROM usage_facts f JOIN orgs o ON o.id = f.org_id AND o.login = :org JOIN skus s ON s.id = f.sku_id AND s.name = 'copilot_premium_request' JOIN team_members tm ON tm.user_id = f.user_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = tm.team_id WHERE f.metric LIKE 'premium_requests%' AND f.day BETWEEN :from AND :to GROUP BY month, team, model ORDER BY month, team, model
